design_philosophy: Trust/security focused design with Swiss high-contrast layout, blending the authority of cybersecurity with modern, frictionless e-commerce. High readability, clear value proposition, and instant visual feedback for license delivery.

colors.archetype: ARCHETYPE 4: SWISS & HIGH-CONTRAST (Authority, Clarity, Trust) with Norton-inspired accents
colors.note: Avoid pure black/white, slightly tint greys. Use Alert Yellow (primary) sparingly for CTAs, and Secure Green for delivery/trust badges. Use deep gray (#0A0A0A) for structural foundations.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px bottom border border-border.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_products: Flat solid backgrounds, 1px subtle border, rounded-lg, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-transform duration-300.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_dashboard: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout. Minimal shadow. High density.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.checkout_panel: Neumorphism tactile variant but flat: soft shadow with sharp inner contrast, 1px border black/5 to ground it. Highlights security.

spacing_and_layout.marketing_sections: Generous Spacing: py-20 md:py-32. Container padded p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Mode A 'Tetris' grid for 'How it Works' or Features. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B 'High Density' for Admin panel. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.product_catalog: Grid cols-1 sm:cols-2 lg:cols-3 gap-8. Image constraints: max-h-[300px] object-contain.

components.strategy: Hybrid. Custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing hero and bento grids. Shadcn UI for forms, selects, tables (dashboard), dialogs, and accordion (FAQs).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md), strong contrast, clear hover state (e.g., hover:bg-yellow-400 hover:text-black).
components.inputs: Shadcn default but with focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-400 focus:border-yellow-400.
components.badges: Use secure green or muted gray for product tiers. Essential for 'Instant Delivery' and 'Trust' indicators.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Click/press states. Transition transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a subtle trust banner (e.g., 'Trusted by 10,000+ users • 100% Secure Checkout • Instant Email Delivery').

icons_and_assets.library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone for marketing, Regular for dashboard) to convey a premium, secure feel. Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
icons_and_assets.required_icons: ShieldCheck, LockKey, EnvelopeOpen (for instant delivery), CreditCard, CheckCircle.

images.description: Padlock on laptop with light trails. Great for hero section background or 'Instant Delivery & Security' feature block.
Red padlock on black keyboard. Suitable for 'Secure Payment' section.
Person using laptop computer holding card. Ideal for the Checkout or How it Works (Payment) step.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over any background meets 4.5:1 ratio. Yellow primary buttons must have black text.
accessibility.focus: High-contrast focus rings for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='checkout-paypal-button').

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do NOT use pure black/white/gray without tinting. Do NOT use standard SaaS blue.
Ensure generous spacing (p-12, p-16) instead of cramped p-4.
Use glass-morphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) for sticky headers over content. DO NOT use complete transparent background in header or dropdowns.
NEVER use generic placeholder images or text. Rely on provided image URLs.
NEVER apply transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
DO NOT center align the app container. Use proper layout grids.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for security badges and UI elements.
Include hover states and micro-animations for all buttons, product cards, and links.
Component Reuse: Prioritize Shadcn components. Create custom components matching Shadcn patterns when necessary.
Toasts: Use Sonner for instant delivery notifications and cart updates.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a full e-commerce flow for BuyInstantKeys. Start with the marketing homepage featuring hero, trust badges, featured products, and how-it-works. Create product catalog, detailed product pages (with 1/3/5 device tiers), a shopping cart, and a secure checkout page. Also build an order tracking page and an admin dashboard for managing product keys. Ensure high contrast, professional typography (Outfit + IBM Plex Sans), and a secure, trustworthy aesthetic. The project uses .js files, so write React code without TypeScript annotations.
